changed_files.summary: Added confirmed credential-bearing export bundle construction with API keys only under credential: { status: 'present', apiKey }, containsSecrets: true, and credential-bearing app metadata.
Added POST /api/providers/export-with-secrets route with per-request confirmation enforcement and stable SECRET_EXPORT_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED rejection.

bun test src/server/__tests__/providers..summary: 67 pass, 0 fail, 226 expect() calls. New export-with-secrets confirmation, labeling, selected credential, and local auth exclusion tests passed.

bun run check:server.summary: 1138 pass, 7 skip, 0 fail, 4180 expect() calls across 101 files. Initial 120s attempt timed out with no result; rerun with 300s timeout completed successfully.

must_preserve_evidence.G-SECRET-EXPORT: Missing or false confirmation returns 400 with SECRET_EXPORT_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED; confirmed route sets containsSecrets true and does not remember confirmation.
must_preserve_evidence.G-SEC-REDIRECT: Default /api/providers/export still uses the existing secret-free mapper; secret export puts selected provider API keys only inside provider.credential.
must_preserve_evidence.G-SCOPE: Edits were limited to src/server/services/providerService.ts and src/server/api/providers.ts; no .env, desktop, user config, credential, or generated output artifact was edited.
must_preserve_evidence.G-TEST: Focused provider tests and server check both passed.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-003: Both secret-free and credential-bearing export paths exist as separate endpoints.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-004: Default export path remains containsSecrets false and credential redacted/missing.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-005: Secret export is high-friction via explicit acknowledgedCredentialExposure true and credential-bearing metadata.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-010: Server-owned export mapping controls redaction and secret inclusion; no frontend masking dependency was introduced.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-001: Exports read the provider index and return bundles without writing provider index or managed settings.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-006: Raw API keys are excluded from default export and only included by the confirmed secret route.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-007: Confirmed secret export is per request, labeled credential-bearing, and excludes official OAuth/login/local auth state.

concerns: Project cognition query was blocked before implementation: status.json exists but project-cognition.db is missing. Proceeded with live repo evidence per workflow guidance.
Repository already had concurrent/uncommitted changes in tests/spec artifacts and existing provider import/export work; I did not revert or overwrite them.
Native subagent dispatch tools were not exposed in this runtime, so execution proceeded inline within the explicit T013 packet scope.
recovery_hints: If future verification needs project cognition closeout, repair or rebuild .specify/project-cognition/project-cognition.db first.
For any future schema tightening, keep credential-bearing metadata inside fields accepted by ProviderBundleSchema or update the schema and tests together.
consumer_evidence: Task evidence was consumed by downstream join points and final verification; see implement-tracker completed_checks plus this result validation_output.
